config.name: AUDIOCLK
config.description: Selects the external audio clock frequency.

config.name: DAC1SH_REQUIRED
config.description: Enables demand for the DAC1 sample-and-hold clock.

config.name: LPTIM1_REQUIRED
config.description: Enables demand for the LPTIM1 clock.

config.name: I3C1_REQUIRED
config.description: Enables demand for the I3C1 clock.

config.name: XSPI1_REQUIRED
config.description: Enables demand for the XSPI1 clock.

config.name: ETH1_REQUIRED
config.description: Enables demand for the ETH1 clock.

config.name: ETH1PTP_REQUIRED
config.description: Enables demand for the ETH1 PTP clock.

config.name: ETH1REFCLK_SEL
config.description: Selects the ETH1 RMII reference clock source.

config.name: PSI_FREQ
config.description: Selects the PSI oscillator nominal frequency.

config.name: PSI_REFSRC
config.description: Selects the PSI oscillator reference source.

config.name: PSI_REF
config.values: RCC_CR2_PSIREF_REF32K768 RCC_CR2_PSIREF_REF8M RCC_CR2_PSIREF_REF16M RCC_CR2_PSIREF_REF24M RCC_CR2_PSIREF_REF25M RCC_CR2_PSIREF_REF32M RCC_CR2_PSIREF_REF48M RCC_CR2_PSIREF_REF50M
config.description: Selects the PSI oscillator reference frequency.

config.name: HSIKDIV
config.values: RCC_CR2_HSIKDIV_DIV1 RCC_CR2_HSIKDIV_DIV1_5 RCC_CR2_HSIKDIV_DIV2 RCC_CR2_HSIKDIV_DIV2_5 RCC_CR2_HSIKDIV_DIV3 RCC_CR2_HSIKDIV_DIV3_5 RCC_CR2_HSIKDIV_DIV4 RCC_CR2_HSIKDIV_DIV4_5 RCC_CR2_HSIKDIV_DIV5 RCC_CR2_HSIKDIV_DIV5_5 RCC_CR2_HSIKDIV_DIV6 RCC_CR2_HSIKDIV_DIV6_5 RCC_CR2_HSIKDIV_DIV7 RCC_CR2_HSIKDIV_DIV7_5 RCC_CR2_HSIKDIV_DIV8

config.name: PSIKDIV
config.values: RCC_CR2_PSIKDIV_DIV1 RCC_CR2_PSIKDIV_DIV1_5 RCC_CR2_PSIKDIV_DIV2 RCC_CR2_PSIKDIV_DIV2_5 RCC_CR2_PSIKDIV_DIV3 RCC_CR2_PSIKDIV_DIV3_5 RCC_CR2_PSIKDIV_DIV4 RCC_CR2_PSIKDIV_DIV4_5 RCC_CR2_PSIKDIV_DIV5 RCC_CR2_PSIKDIV_DIV5_5 RCC_CR2_PSIKDIV_DIV6 RCC_CR2_PSIKDIV_DIV6_5 RCC_CR2_PSIKDIV_DIV7 RCC_CR2_PSIKDIV_DIV7_5 RCC_CR2_PSIKDIV_DIV8

config.name: MCO1_SEL
config.values: RCC_CFGR1_MCO1SEL_SYSCLK RCC_CFGR1_MCO1SEL_HSE RCC_CFGR1_MCO1SEL_LSE RCC_CFGR1_MCO1SEL_LSI RCC_CFGR1_MCO1SEL_PSIK RCC_CFGR1_MCO1SEL_HSIK RCC_CFGR1_MCO1SEL_PSIS RCC_CFGR1_MCO1SEL_HSIS

config.name: MCO1PRE_VALUE
config.description: Configures the MCO1 clock prescaler, zero disables MCO1.

config.name: MCO2_SEL
config.values: RCC_CFGR1_MCO2SEL_SYSCLK RCC_CFGR1_MCO2SEL_HSE RCC_CFGR1_MCO2SEL_LSE RCC_CFGR1_MCO2SEL_LSI RCC_CFGR1_MCO2SEL_PSIK RCC_CFGR1_MCO2SEL_HSIK RCC_CFGR1_MCO2SEL_PSIDIV3 RCC_CFGR1_MCO2SEL_HSIDIV3

config.name: MCO2PRE_VALUE
config.description: Configures the MCO2 clock prescaler, zero disables MCO2.

assert.name: PSI_HSE_REFERENCE
assert.condition: (STM32_CFG_PSI_REFSRC != RCC_CR2_PSIREFSRC_HSE) || (((STM32_CFG_PSI_FREQ == RCC_CR2_PSIFREQ_FREQ100M) && ((STM32_CFG_PSI_REF == RCC_CR2_PSIREF_REF8M) || (STM32_CFG_PSI_REF == RCC_CR2_PSIREF_REF16M) || (STM32_CFG_PSI_REF == RCC_CR2_PSIREF_REF24M) || (STM32_CFG_PSI_REF == RCC_CR2_PSIREF_REF25M) || (STM32_CFG_PSI_REF == RCC_CR2_PSIREF_REF32M) || (STM32_CFG_PSI_REF == RCC_CR2_PSIREF_REF48M) || (STM32_CFG_PSI_REF == RCC_CR2_PSIREF_REF50M))) || ((STM32_CFG_PSI_FREQ == RCC_CR2_PSIFREQ_FREQ144M) && ((STM32_CFG_PSI_REF == RCC_CR2_PSIREF_REF8M) || (STM32_CFG_PSI_REF == RCC_CR2_PSIREF_REF16M) || (STM32_CFG_PSI_REF == RCC_CR2_PSIREF_REF24M) || (STM32_CFG_PSI_REF == RCC_CR2_PSIREF_REF32M) || (STM32_CFG_PSI_REF == RCC_CR2_PSIREF_REF48M))) || ((STM32_CFG_PSI_FREQ == RCC_CR2_PSIFREQ_FREQ160M) && ((STM32_CFG_PSI_REF == RCC_CR2_PSIREF_REF8M) || (STM32_CFG_PSI_REF == RCC_CR2_PSIREF_REF16M) || (STM32_CFG_PSI_REF == RCC_CR2_PSIREF_REF24M) || (STM32_CFG_PSI_REF == RCC_CR2_PSIREF_REF32M) || (STM32_CFG_PSI_REF == RCC_CR2_PSIREF_REF48M))))
assert.message: invalid STM32_CFG_PSI_REF value for HSE-referenced PSI

assert.name: PSI_HSI18_REFERENCE
assert.message: invalid STM32_CFG_PSI_REF value for HSI/18-referenced PSI

assert.name: PSI_LSE_REFERENCE
assert.message: invalid STM32_CFG_PSI_REF value for LSE-referenced PSI

clock.description: programmable speed internal oscillator divided by 3

sink.name: PSIK_SOURCE
sink.description: PSIK conditional frequency dependency on PSI

sink.name: USART1_SERIAL_DRIVER
sink.description: Serial driver demands the USART1 clock when enabled.

sink.name: USART1_SIO_DRIVER
sink.description: SIO driver demands the USART1 clock when enabled.

sink.name: USART2_SERIAL_DRIVER
sink.description: Serial driver demands the USART2 clock when enabled.

sink.name: USART2_SIO_DRIVER
sink.description: SIO driver demands the USART2 clock when enabled.

sink.name: USART3_SERIAL_DRIVER
sink.description: Serial driver demands the USART3 clock when enabled.

sink.name: USART3_SIO_DRIVER
sink.description: SIO driver demands the USART3 clock when enabled.

sink.name: UART4_SERIAL_DRIVER
sink.description: Serial driver demands the UART4 clock when enabled.

sink.name: UART4_SIO_DRIVER
sink.description: SIO driver demands the UART4 clock when enabled.

sink.name: UART5_SERIAL_DRIVER
sink.description: Serial driver demands the UART5 clock when enabled.

sink.name: UART5_SIO_DRIVER
sink.description: SIO driver demands the UART5 clock when enabled.

sink.name: USART6_SERIAL_DRIVER
sink.description: Serial driver demands the USART6 clock when enabled.

sink.name: USART6_SIO_DRIVER
sink.description: SIO driver demands the USART6 clock when enabled.

sink.name: UART7_SERIAL_DRIVER
sink.description: Serial driver demands the UART7 clock when enabled.

sink.name: UART7_SIO_DRIVER
sink.description: SIO driver demands the UART7 clock when enabled.

sink.name: LPUART1_SERIAL_DRIVER
sink.description: Serial driver demands the LPUART1 clock when enabled.

sink.name: LPUART1_SIO_DRIVER
sink.description: SIO driver demands the LPUART1 clock when enabled.

sink.name: SPI1_DRIVER
sink.description: SPI driver demands the SPI1 clock when enabled.

sink.name: SPI2_DRIVER
sink.description: SPI driver demands the SPI2 clock when enabled.

sink.name: SPI3_DRIVER
sink.description: SPI driver demands the SPI3 clock when enabled.

sink.name: FDCAN_DRIVER
sink.description: CAN driver demands the FDCAN clock when enabled.

sink.name: I2C1_DRIVER
sink.description: I2C driver demands the I2C1 clock when enabled.

sink.name: I2C2_DRIVER
sink.description: I2C driver demands the I2C2 clock when enabled.

sink.name: I3C1_REQUIRED
sink.description: Local option demands the I3C1 clock when enabled.

sink.name: ADCDAC_ADC_DRIVER
sink.description: ADC driver demands the ADCDAC clock when enabled.

sink.name: ADCDAC_DAC_DRIVER
sink.description: DAC driver demands the ADCDAC clock when enabled.

sink.name: DAC1SH_REQUIRED
sink.description: DAC sample-and-hold logic demands the DAC1SH clock when enabled.

sink.name: LPTIM1_REQUIRED
sink.description: Local option demands the LPTIM1 clock when enabled.

sink.name: USB1_DRIVER
sink.description: USB driver demands the USB clock when enabled.

sink.name: RNG_DRIVER
sink.description: TRNG driver demands the RNG clock when enabled.

sink.name: XSPI1_REQUIRED
sink.description: Local option demands the XSPI1 clock when enabled.

sink.name: XSPI1_WSPI_DRIVER
sink.description: WSPI driver demands the XSPI1 clock when enabled.

sink.name: ETH1_REQUIRED
sink.description: Local option demands the ETH1 clock when enabled.

sink.name: ETH1_MAC_DRIVER
sink.description: MAC driver demands the ETH1 clock when enabled.

sink.name: ETH1PTP_REQUIRED
sink.description: Local option demands the ETH1 PTP clock when enabled.

sink.name: MCO1_HSE_SOURCE
sink.description: MCO1 demands HSE when selected as its output source.

sink.name: MCO1_LSE_SOURCE
sink.description: MCO1 demands LSE when selected as its output source.

sink.name: MCO1_LSI_SOURCE
sink.description: MCO1 demands LSI when selected as its output source.

sink.name: MCO1_PSIK_SOURCE
sink.description: MCO1 demands PSIK when selected as its output source.

sink.name: MCO1_HSIK_SOURCE
sink.description: MCO1 demands HSIK when selected as its output source.

sink.name: MCO1_PSIS_SOURCE
sink.description: MCO1 demands PSIS when selected as its output source.

sink.name: MCO1_HSIS_SOURCE
sink.description: MCO1 demands HSIS when selected as its output source.

sink.name: MCO2_HSE_SOURCE
sink.description: MCO2 demands HSE when selected as its output source.

sink.name: MCO2_LSE_SOURCE
sink.description: MCO2 demands LSE when selected as its output source.

sink.name: MCO2_LSI_SOURCE
sink.description: MCO2 demands LSI when selected as its output source.

sink.name: MCO2_PSIK_SOURCE
sink.description: MCO2 demands PSIK when selected as its output source.

sink.name: MCO2_HSIK_SOURCE
sink.description: MCO2 demands HSIK when selected as its output source.

sink.name: MCO2_PSIDIV3_SOURCE
sink.description: MCO2 demands PSIDIV3 when selected as its output source.

sink.name: MCO2_HSIDIV3_SOURCE
sink.description: MCO2 demands HSIDIV3 when selected as its output source.
